items.subject: Integrated Science
items.title: Human Digestive System Diagram
items.description: A detailed labeled diagram of the human digestive system showing all major organs from mouth to large intestine. Suitable for class notes and revision.

items.subject: Integrated Science
items.title: Photosynthesis Process Notes
items.description: Comprehensive notes covering the process of photosynthesis, light and dark reactions, factors affecting photosynthesis, and its importance to life on Earth.

items.subject: Mathematics
items.title: Mathematics Term 2 Assignment
items.description: Term 2 algebra assignment covering linear equations, simultaneous equations, and word problems. Answer all questions and show your working.

items.subject: Social Studies
items.title: Map of Kenya — Physical Features
items.description: A detailed physical map of Kenya showing mountains, rivers, lakes, and major geographical features. Print-ready for classroom use.

items.subject: English
items.title: English Composition Writing Guide
items.description: A guide to writing excellent compositions including narrative, descriptive, and argumentative essays. Includes sample essays and marking rubrics.

items.subject: Integrated Science
items.title: Plant Cell Structure Diagram
items.description: Labeled diagram of a plant cell showing cell wall, cell membrane, nucleus, chloroplasts, vacuole, and other organelles.

items.subject: Kiswahili
items.title: Kiswahili Insha — Mwongozo
items.description: Mwongozo wa kuandika insha bora za Kiswahili. Inajumuisha aina za insha, muundo, na mifano ya insha zilizofaulu.

items.subject: Integrated Science
items.title: Grade 9 Science Revision Paper
items.description: End of Term 2 revision paper for Grade 9 Integrated Science. Covers all topics taught in Term 1 and 2. Includes marking scheme.

items.subject: Agriculture
items.title: Agriculture — Soil Types Worksheet
items.description: Fill-in worksheet about different soil types in Kenya — sandy, loamy, clay, and their properties. Includes soil profile diagram to label.

items.subject: Computer Studies
items.title: Computer Studies — Parts of a Computer
items.description: Labeled diagram showing all major parts of a desktop computer including monitor, CPU, keyboard, mouse, and internal components.

items.subject: Creative Arts
items.title: Creative Arts — Color Theory Notes
items.description: Notes on color theory covering primary, secondary, and tertiary colors, color wheel, warm and cool colors, and color harmony principles.

items.subject: Mathematics
items.title: Grade 8 Mathematics End-Term Exam
items.description: Grade 8 Mathematics end of term examination paper with marking scheme. Covers integers, fractions, geometry, and algebra.
